arts.ttl: Sky Sports News host hailed for Mathys Tel moment as Arsenal and Man Utd miss out
arts.sum: Sky Sports News host Nick Powell and Sky Germany's Sarah Wieczorek were lauded by fans for their unique reporting of Mathys Tel's deadline day move to Tottenham Hotspur

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Arsenal – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: It is a pivotal encounter on Tyneside tonight as Newcastle and Arsenal battle it out for a place in the Carabao Cup final. Newcastle take a two-goal lead into the second leg of the semi-final courtesy of a 2-0 victory in North London. arts.ttl: Arsenal star Gabriel Jesus drops injury update days after Ollie Watkins transfer decision
arts.sum: Gabriel Jesus is putting the work in to overcome his knee injury that will see him miss the remainder of the season for Arsenal. At 29, Arsenal were keen to test Aston Villa's resolve over Watkins but never made a second bid having learned of their intention to sell Jhon Duran to Al Nassr.

arts.ttl: 'More than any other player': Mikel Arteta says £65m star is easily the most professional player at Arsenal
Newcastle United "complete" £2.5million deal for Turkish teenager as Paul Mitchell makes swoop
arts.sum: Newcastle United have "completed" the transfer of Turkish 18-year-old Baran Yildiz from Genclerbirligi - according to a claim by their general manager. The club's GM, Ali Ekber Düzgün said in a statement to Turkish media: "Baran Yıldız's transfer to Newcastle United has been completed.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer makes bold prediction for Arsenal vs Newcastle Carabao Cup clash
arts.sum: Arsenal were beaten at home by Newcastle United in the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final, leaving Mikel Arteta's side with a lot of work to do on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Transfer news LIVE: Arsenal 'agree' Nico Williams deal as Chelsea eye Gittens
arts.sum: The transfer window has closed for most top European leagues but planning will already be all underway for the summer window. Teams are working tirelessly behind the scenes on identifying targets...

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel reveals why he made Tottenham transfer over Arsenal and Man Utd
arts.sum: Mathys Tel had a number of clubs pursuing him but eventually opted for Tottenham over Arsenal or Manchester United with Bayern Munich's Harry Kane helping to influence him

arts.ttl: Joelinton replacement named and Howe changed backed as Arsenal verdict given
arts.sum: It's Carabao Cup semi-final day and despite Eddie Howe's team all but picking itself of late, the Newcastle United boss has decisions to make for the second leg with Arsenal. Starting XI: Dubravka, Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall, Longstaff, Bruno, Tonali, Gordon, Murphy, Isak.

arts.ttl: ‘Personal annoynace’ – Player disappointed Newcastle United haven’t moved for him yet
arts.sum: Boca Juniors’ Kevin Zenón isn’t pleased with the lack of concrete efforts from Newcastle United to sign him, according to Infobae. The Magpies are one of the clubs to be regularly named as an interested party. In October, Pasión Fútbol stated Newcastle were in the picture to sign him in the winter market.
